description: check_safety (data.police.uk) and an uncited web_search snippet disagree on the crime count for Deptford. Used by D10.

data.recommendation: This area has a safety level of Moderate with a safety score of 56/100

data.results:
### Web Search: Deptford crime
An unsourced property-forum post claims Deptford had 'more than 500 crimes in the last six months' and calls it a no-go area. No official data is cited.

detailed_data.web_search_0: forum post claims 500+ crimes in 6 months, uncited
